nasb.text: But the plot became known to Mordecai and he told Queen Esther, and Esther informed the king in Mordecai’s name.

esv.text: And this came to the knowledge of Mordecai, and he told it to Queen Esther, and Esther told the king in the name of Mordecai.

cnv.text: 這陰謀給末底改知道了，他就告訴王后以斯帖；以斯帖就以末底改的名義對王說起這事。

ccb.text: 末底改知道后，便通知以斯帖王后，以斯帖就以末底改的名义禀告王。
